allies.rationale_text: Cognitive-load-theory gives information-theory the working-memory boundary that explains why signal shape matters.
allies.source_quote: Cognitive Load Theory ... provides the neurological foundation for Information Theory's rules.

allies.rationale_text: Simplification supports information-theory when pruning makes the core signal legible without destroying the action-relevant meaning.
allies.source_quote: The main challenge is pruning, ordering, and packaging information so the core signal survives contact with limited working memory.

allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps information-theory decide which structural context must remain in the message so compression does not sever meaning from reality.
allies.source_quote: Systems Thinking offers the broader contextual structure within which information should be organized.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias distorts information-theory by protecting a preferred narrative instead of letting message structure reflect the real evidence.
antagonists.source_quote: Motivated reasoning processes information to reach a desired conclusion, rather than seeking the truth.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Information-theory conflicts with systems-thinking when compressing information for cognitive efficiency discards the interconnections that carry the system-level signal.
structured_tensions.source_quote: information-theory conflicts with systems-thinking (systems thinking) when compressing information for cognitive efficiency discards the interconnections that carry the system-level signal.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Information-theory conflicts with simplification when information-theoretic compression strips out noise that turns out to be a meaningful weak signal.
structured_tensions.source_quote: information-theory conflicts with simplification (simplification) when information-theoretic compression strips out noise that turns out to be a meaningful weak signal.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on load-aware allies and one clean anti-bias conflict rather than on an explicit structured tension block.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor communication ontology sprawl where the raw source mainly supports CLT, simplification, and anti-bias structure.
open_questions: Constraints and goal-setting are source-real neighboring ideas, but cognitive-load-theory, simplification, and systems-thinking were the cleaner bounded anchors into the current graph vocabulary.
